column1: When the ambassador of Escalopia returned home from lunch, his wife 1 _____ (get) a shock.

"And where 11 _____ (be) in my office as usual," 13 _____ (answer) the Ambassador.
I 15 _____ (go down) immediately, of course, and that fool, Horst, 16 _____ (aim) a fire extinguisher at me.
I must definitely get that fellow posted." The Ambassador's wife 19 _____ (go on) asking questions, when she suddenly 20 _____ (notice) a big hole in her husband's hat.
Someone 24 _____ (fire) a shot through my office window.
